task.title: Use local SDK for relay-dashboard and validate tests

events.content: Pinned dashboard-server SDK to local relay/packages/sdk and rebuilt local SDK dist before validation: Pinned dashboard-server SDK to local relay/packages/sdk and rebuilt local SDK dist before validation

raw.question: Pinned dashboard-server SDK to local relay/packages/sdk and rebuilt local SDK dist before validation
raw.chosen: Pinned dashboard-server SDK to local relay/packages/sdk and rebuilt local SDK dist before validation
raw.reasoning: Linked package was pointing at stale dist exports, causing false missing-export failures until rebuilt.

retrospective.summary: Linked dashboard-server to local SDK, rebuilt SDK dist, migrated relaycast-provider/log websocket to current SDK surface, and restored passing typecheck/tests.
